positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized geometric mural pattern featuring stylized cosmic flora and fauna. The central motif is a cluster of glowing, bioluminescent celestial leaves intertwined with abstract constellations. Use bold, clean silhouettes and minimalist linework. The color palette should be restricted to deep sapphire blues, electric cyan, neon magenta, and highly contrasting matte black against an off-white background. Flat graphic design style, high contrast vector art aesthetic, suitable for repeating textile pattern. Central composition, clean hard edges, studio lighting setup, vector illustration style.
negative: photorealistic, blur, noise, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, signature, cropped, poor anatomy, messy, grayscale, faded, excessive detail, cartoon, childish
